Click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " once complete."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TNTExpressShippingSetup6.05T5g00000xsUaXEAU.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TNTExpressShippingSetup6.05T5g00000xsUaXEAU.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image6", "width": 700, "height": 248}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Name your shipping services and give them a description. This information will be visible to customers on your website. Once complete, move on to the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TNTExpressShippingSetup7.05T5g00000xsSvKEAU.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TNTExpressShippingSetup7.05T5g00000xsSvKEAU.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image7", "width": 700, "height": 247}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set if the shipping options should "}, {"text": "Show To Customers And Staff", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Show To Staff Only", "bold": true}, {"text": " (for creating orders manually). You can also configure if delivery to PO Boxes is available. Once complete, move on to the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": ". To set different options for each service, click the "}, {"text": "Apply Visibility And PO Box Delivery Settings For Selected Services", "bold": true}, {"text": " box."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TNTExpressShippingSetup8.05T5g00000xsUQiEAM.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TNTExpressShippingSetup8.05T5g00000xsUQiEAM.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image8", "width": 700, "height": 247}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can now add a "}, {"text": "Discount Incentive", "bold": true}, {"text": " when a customer orders a certain amount. These are optional, set them if you wish and then move on to the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TNTExpressShippingSetup9.05T5g00000xsUluEAE.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TNTExpressShippingSetup9.05T5g00000xsUluEAE.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image9", "width": 700, "height": 247}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Choose which type of printer you will use to print shipping labels, and click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TNTExpressShippingSetup10.05T5g00000xsUj1EAE.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TNTExpressShippingSetup10.05T5g00000xsUj1EAE.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image10", "width": 700, "height": 244}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Review your settings. You can still make any changes by going back to the relevant section. If you're happy with the configuration, select "}, {"text": "Complete", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TNTExpressShippingSetup11.05T5g00000xsUtKEAU.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TNTExpressShippingSetup11.05T5g00000xsUtKEAU.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image11", "width": 700, "height": 247}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "For all carrier shipping options we also recommend "}, {"text": "setting backup rates"}, {"text": " in case the carrier's API suffers an outage."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "TNT Shipping Labels"}], "data-id": "2"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up the TNT labels:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Shipping section locate TNT and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Fill in the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://forms.neto.com.au/services/shippingcarrierlabelsetup.html", "children": [{"text": "Shipping Carrier Label Setup Form"}]}, {"text": " and Neto staff will set up the shipping labels for you for free."}]}]}]}]
